title: Delicious Chicken - Precut, Skinless, 500 g

title: Malabar Prawns - Fresh & Juicy, Marinated, Ready To Cook, 450 g (22-28 pcs 16-20 g each)

Serves 2-3 people and takes 10-15 minutes to prepare. The prawns are 30/40 size, 15-20 grams each, and come with 22-28 pieces.

title: Raw Kadaknath - Whole, With Skin, Tender & Juicy, 1 pc (1.3 kg - 1.5 kg)
description: Kadaknath is also famously called kali masi, it is an Indian breed of chicken that is known to be extremely healthy. It is a meat of matured chicken, its taste and texture are quite subtle and it's tender in nature. The Kadaknath chicken gravy has a long-lasting flavour making the chicken lip-smacking. Order this fresh meat from Big Basket online and have it delivered to your doorstep.

title: Total Fresh Chilled Chicken - Lollipop, 400 g

Antibiotic residue free.

title: Chicken Wings, 450 g (8-10 pcs)
description: Chicken Wings are a beloved cut, celebrated for their rich flavour and tender meat, making them ideal for a variety of cooking methods. Often enjoyed as a snack or appetiser, wings can be baked, fried, or grilled and are perfect for soaking up marinades and sauces. Whether tossed in spicy buffalo sauce, coated in barbecue glaze, or served with a side of dipping sauce, chicken wings are a crowd-pleaser for gatherings and events. Their versatility and ease of preparation make them a popular choice for any occasion.

title: Chicken Gizzard, 1 kg (38-45 pcs)
description: Chicken Gizzard is a unique and flavourful organ meat that adds a distinct taste to various dishes. Known for its firm texture, gizzards are often used in soups, stews, and stir-fries, where they absorb flavours beautifully. They can also be marinated and grilled, pan-fried, or sautéed for a delicious snack or appetiser. Rich in protein, chicken gizzards are a versatile ingredient that can be seasoned with a variety of spices and herbs, making them an exciting addition to your culinary repertoire.

title: Lamb Mutton Boneless, 250 g (7-9 pcs)
description: Mutton Lamb Boneless is a premium cut of lamb, offering tender, lean meat without the bone, perfect for a wide range of dishes. Its versatility makes it ideal for curries, stir-fries, kebabs, and stews, where the meat absorbs flavours well and remains juicy. Boneless lamb is easy to cook, allowing for quicker preparation and even cooking. Whether used in traditional recipes or modern cuisine, Mutton Lamb Boneless provides a rich, hearty base for various meals, offering convenience and flavour.

title: Ladies' Fingers, 1 kg
description: In the rich tapestry of Indian cuisine, Ladies' Fingers, known locally as 'bhindi' or 'okra', holds a prominent place. This versatile vegetable, with its elongated shape and tender texture, is celebrated for its culinary adaptability. Often used in curries, stir-fries, and even as a crispy side dish, bhindi adds a unique mucilaginous quality that thickens gravies and enhances flavours. Its popularity spans across regional variations, from spicy masalas in the North to coconut-infused preparations in the South.

title: Carrot - Orange, 1 kg
description: A popular sweet-tasting root vegetable, carrots are narrow and cone-shaped. They have thick, fleshy, deeply coloured roots which grow underground and feathery green leaves that emerge above the ground. While these greens are fresh-tasting and slightly bitter, the carrot roots are crunchy textured with a sweet and minty aromatic taste. Fresho! brings you the flavour and richness of the finest crispy and juicy carrots that are locally grown and the best of the region.In the vibrant tapestry of Indian cuisine, orange carrots play a versatile role, prized for their sweetness and vibrant hue. Whether grated into salads, blended into creamy soups, or incorporated into decadent desserts like gajar ka halwa, these carrots lend their distinct flavour and colour. In traditional Indian households, they are a staple vegetable used in everyday cooking, enhancing dishes with their natural sweetness. Carrots are also pickled or added to savoury snacks like samosas for added texture and flavour. Their availability year-round and adaptability in both sweet and savoury preparations make them a beloved ingredient across India's diverse culinary landscape.

title: Local Tomato, 1 kg
description: Tomato is a supplement thick superfood that offers advantage to a scope of real systems.It has numerous little seeds. It is extremely scrumptious. It is likewise useful for wellbeing. Most tomatoes are red. They are a good source of Vitamin A, C, K, Iron, Folate and Potassium. They are used in salads, curries, soups and other dishes. We source best quality tomatoes and deliver it fresh at your door step

title: Cauliflower, 1 pc (approx. 400 to 600 g)
description: In the rich tapestry of Indian cuisine, cauliflower holds a cherished place as a versatile and widely used vegetable. Known as 'Gobi' in Hindi, it features prominently in various regional dishes. From the iconic Punjabi favourite 'Aloo Gobi' (potato and cauliflower curry) to the spicy Maharashtrian 'Gobi Masala,' it adapts seamlessly to different cooking styles and flavours. Cauliflower is also enjoyed battered and fried as 'Gobi Pakoras' or as a delicious addition to biryanis and pulavs. Its ability to absorb spices and its unique texture make it a beloved ingredient, offering a hearty and satisfying element to Indian meals.

title: Onion - Organically Grown, 1 kg
description: Onion - Organically Grown are carefully nurtured to ensure they retain their natural flavour, nutritional goodness, and freshness. Ideal for enhancing a wide range of dishes including salads, soups, stews, and curries, these onions offer a robust taste and crisp texture.

title: Brinjal - Varikatri, 500 g
description: Brinjal, known as 'Varikatri' in some regions of India, is a distinct variety appreciated for its small size and vibrant purple colour. This type of Brinjal is commonly used in Indian cooking, particularly in dishes from South India and Maharashtra. It has a slightly bitter taste and a tender texture when cooked, making it suitable for various culinary applications. Varikatri Brinjal is often used in curries, stir-fries, and stuffed preparations, where its flavour enhances the overall dish. Its versatility in regional cuisines highlights its importance as a staple vegetable, beloved for its taste and contribution to traditional Indian meals.

title: Cabbage - Organically Grown, 1 pc (approx. 400-700g)
description: Cabbage is a robust and nutritious vegetable celebrated for its versatility in cooking. With a crisp texture and a mild, slightly sweet flavour, cabbage adds depth to various dishes. Cabbage can be enjoyed in salads or stews, or cooked in stir-fries, soups, where it softens to a tender consistency and absorbs flavours well.

title: Bitter Gourd, 500 g
description: Bitter Gourd, also known as bitter melon or 'karela' in Hindi, is a distinctive vegetable in Indian cuisine appreciated for its sharp, bitter taste. Often used in regional dishes across India, it is valued not just for its flavour but also for its versatility in cooking. Bitter Gourd is commonly stir-fried, stuffed, or added to curries, providing a unique contrast to other ingredients. In some Indian recipes, its bitterness is balanced with spices, tamarind, or jaggery. Bitter Gourd is also pickled or used in soups, showcasing its adaptability in various culinary traditions and its place as a staple in Indian kitchens.

title: English Cucumber, 250 g
description: English Cucumbers are a refreshing and versatile addition to your kitchen. Grown naturally, these long, slender cucumbers offer a crisp texture and mild, refreshing flavour. Perfect for salads, sandwiches, or as a healthy snack, they bring a delightful crunch to any dish. Packed with hydration and low in calories, English cucumbers are ideal for those seeking a nutritious lifestyle. Their thin skin is tender enough to eat, and they have fewer seeds than regular cucumbers, making them exceptionally easy to prepare. Enjoy the natural goodness and vibrant green colour that English cucumbers bring to your meals.

title: Potato, 1 kg
description: Potatoes offer a taste of pure, earthy goodness. Each spud is hand-picked for its perfect texture and flavour, ideal for crispy roasties or creamy mash. Packed with nutrients and versatility, they transform every meal into a wholesome delight. Enjoy the freshness and quality that only fresho! can provide.

title: Watermelon - Small, 1 pc (approx 1.8 - 2.5 kg)
description: Small watermelons are a cherished summer treat, known for their compact size and sweet juiciness. Grown abundantly in states like Maharashtra and Karnataka, these miniatures offer a refreshing respite from the scorching heat. Their crisp, red flesh is a favourite at picnics and festivals, sliced into wedges or scooped into refreshing juices and smoothies. Small watermelons are valued for their convenience and portability, often found piled high at roadside stalls and bustling markets. Packed with hydrating properties and essential nutrients like vitamins A and C, they are a guilt-free indulgence that epitomises India's love for seasonal, fresh produce

title: Banana - Robusta, Small, 500 g (Approx. 5 - 6 pcs)
description: Robusta bananas are slender and have a bright yellow peel. Robusta bananas have a very dense, creamy texture, and once ripe, their flavour is rich and sweet.

title: Banganapalli Mango, 1 kg
description: The Banganapalli mango holds a distinguished place among mango aficionados for its unique taste and texture. Grown primarily in Andhra Pradesh and Telangana, this mango variety is renowned for its large size, oblong shape, and golden-yellow skin with a smooth texture. Its flesh is tender, fibreless, and boasts a sweet, tangy flavour that is both refreshing and satisfying. Banganapalli mangoes are a favourite for making mango desserts, juices, and preserves, highlighting their versatility in Indian cuisine. Rich in vitamins A and C, they offer nutritional benefits along with a delightful mango experience, embodying India's tropical fruit abundance.

title: Guava, 500 g
description: Guava, a tropical fruit bursting with flavour, is known for its sweet and slightly tangy taste. Organically grown, packed with essential nutrients, making it a healthy addition to your diet. Enjoy it fresh, in smoothies, or as a vibrant ingredient in your favourite recipes. Each bite of this delicious fruit brings a touch of the tropics to your table.

title: Pineapple, 1 pc (approx 800g - 1kg)
description: Shaped like a pinecone, the fruit is loosely fibrous and juicy with white to yellowish flesh. The edible centre part is firm, leathery, and sweet. In India, pineapple is a beloved tropical fruit, enjoyed for its sweet and tangy flavour. Found abundantly in the southern and northeastern regions, it is a staple in fruit salads, juices, and traditional desserts. Pineapple is often used in chutneys and pickles, adding a zesty twist to meals. During summer, refreshing pineapple sherbets and smoothies are popular choices to beat the heat. It also plays a role in cultural festivities, often featured in offerings and decorations. With its vibrant taste and versatile uses, pineapple holds a special place in the culinary and cultural fabric of India.
